title: peltopus bliteus
intro: Peltopus bliteus, also known as the creeping sandmat or creeping spurry, is a type of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Peltopus bliteus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is often used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
